News

Updates from AI School.

Use this page for announcements, program launches, student projects, admissions updates, and showcase events.

Launch
Launch

AI School branch prepares for new student pathways

The branch introduces AI learning, online school structure, and project-based academic development.

Admissions
Admissions

Admissions roadmap released

Families can now review the step-by-step pathway for consultation, application, and onboarding.

AI Lab
AI Lab

AI Lab model announced

The lab will support coding, prototyping, ethical AI use, and student capstone projects.

Student Life
Student Life

Mentorship circles added to the program model

Students will have access to structured guidance and portfolio feedback throughout the year.

Online School
Online School

Online learning pathway outlined

The pathway is designed for flexibility while preserving academic structure and accountability.

Innovation
Innovation

Capstone showcase planning begins

Students will present projects, prototypes, and research-inspired work to the community.

AI School

A future-ready education branch for artificial intelligence, online learning, innovation, and student portfolio development.
